architecture.summary: Extends existing eval system: JSON file storage in evals/history/, Node HTTP server backend, React 19 + Vite frontend. No new services. Backward-compatible optional fields on existing types. New baseline run mode reuses existing LLM client pipeline.

integrations.summary: N/A - No external integrations. All changes are internal to the eval system. LLM providers (claude-cli, anthropic, ollama) already integrated. Storage is local JSON files.

performance.summary: N/A - Single-user local tool. History listing reads directory of JSON files, which is fine for expected volume (tens to hundreds of runs). No caching or lazy loading needed beyond existing patterns.

security.summary: N/A - Local-only tool running on localhost. No auth, no PII, no external exposure. Existing CORS localhost check is sufficient.

ui-ux.summary: Trend chart on HistoryPage only, fixed-width. Compare via checkbox selection (2 checked = Compare button). Rerun buttons in both history detail and BenchmarkPage.

edge-cases.summary: Old history entries show N/A for missing enriched fields (no backfill). Baseline-only full runs save to history. Single-case reruns remain transient.
